'''John Wilson''' (born 2 July 1978) is a former [[France national rugby league team|France]] international [[rugby league]] footballer who last played for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]]. Wilson previously played for the [[Parramatta Eels]] and the [[Wests Tigers]] in the [[National Rugby League]] (NRL). Wilson's usual position was {{rlp|sr}}, but he had mainly played as a {{rlp|ce}} for the Catalans Dragons.

==Background==
Wilson was born in [[Coffs Harbour, New South Wales]], Australia.{{cn|date=September 2023}}

==Playing career==
Wilson was one of the most experienced campaigners in the fledgling Dragons outfit. Nicknamed 'Sergeant' by English Dragons followers after the [[Dad's Army]] character, he was a popular figure with fans.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.parraeels.com.au/about/official-player-numbers/|title=Official Player Numbers|website=Parramatta Eels}}</ref>

Wilson was named in the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup squads#France|France squad]] for the [[2008 Rugby League World Cup]].<ref name="France name official squad">{{cite web|url=http://www.rlwc08.com/news/news/archive/2008/09/24/france-name-official-squad.aspx |title=France name official squad |publisher=RLWC2008 |date=24 September 2008 |accessdate=3 October 2008 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20080930072635/http://www.rlwc08.com/news/news/archive/2008/09/24/france-name-official-squad.aspx |archivedate=30 September 2008 }}</ref>

== Career highlights ==
*''Junior Club:'' Wentworthville
*''First Grade Debut:'' Round 22, Parramatta v [[New Zealand Warriors]] at [[Mt Smart Stadium|Ericsson Stadium]], 30 June 2000
*''First Grade Record:'' 65 appearances scoring 30 tries
